content: Completed: Fixed two relative path references in test_dump_page_source_valid and test_recursive_dump_page_source_valid that broke after os.chdir() removal. Both now use os.path.dirname(os.path.realpath(__file__)) for absolute paths. Pre-commit passes clean.
